parts.text: Write a story. The story must only contain 3 or 4 paragraphs and be understandable for a 3 year old. Use simple vocabulary. Only provide the story text. Do NOT include introductions and do NOT talk to the user. The story should: contain the words yıldırım, binmek, üzgün; have a bad ending; contain dialog. The story should be in Turkish.
